Well, in spite of everything ...it worked!

In this video, I show you the final sales number. 

Plus we go over some obvious things I could have done to make this even better.

One of the things I could have done (one of many, mind you) is to have made the sales video better.

Here's the one I used on the page:

https://frankkern.wistia.com/medias/54y1jtiybo

This sales video is *terrible*. I don't build up the value, explain benefits, explain problems that it solves ...nothing. 

BUT IT STILL WORKED.

Proving once again that something beats nothing damn near every time :-)
